feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Maintain PIRs doesn't save PIRs
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm uploading PIRs with Fiori app.

Are 1114 items.

First stesp ( upload file) was done ok, and I see all the items , but when I press "save" a progress bar is showing the progres.. after ( 55%) show this strange error

is there someone that know this error and whe I can see the log to understand what happened ?

Best regards

Gildo

entry.title: SAP HANA Replication task(.hdbreptask) - runtime object?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I intend to document the hdbreptasks which were created in my project. The list is more than 50 and the idea is to have access to view/table in which the rep tasks can be accessed along with the tables configured in it.

I tried multiple system views and could not find a one which gives me data. 

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: sap s4hana cloud - creating journal entry with Business Partner or G/L Account.
entry.content:
Need help. It seems that my sap s4/hana cloud does not permits me to create journal entry manually with a business partner. is that true for your software? 

To rephrase, with sap business one you can post GL directly with a business partner and a GL account code without passing through all the sub-ledgers. 

It is possible as well for SAPS4HANA cloud?

entry.title: 在表中未找到部署场景标识 SAP_COM_0164 的内容
entry.content: 在APP通讯安排中创建场景Material Stock Interration(SAP_COM_0164)，保存的时候提示“在表中未找到部署场景标识 SAP_COM_0164 的内容”，在配置环境中能够配置成功，并且接口调用返回正常，但是在测试环境以及正式环境中均报同样错误

entry.title: FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION
entry.content:
On using loop condition as suggested by Google Gemini to prepare the code for BAdI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION for performing profit center substitution for intercompany supplier invoice journal entries as requested by our client, we are unable to get it to work as it reads such journal entries line by line. Due to the restrictions of this BAdI and the cloud environment, it is not working as expected. SAP has confirmed this restriction of the BAdI that when it operates in context of one item, the other items of posting can't be accessed.

We are getting a ODATA runtime error: 'TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED' while using the loop condition. We are also getting similar runtime errors while performing other functions like PGI for outbound delivery, MIGO post goods receipt etc.

 

Also conditions like class and method can't be used for coding due to non availability of these keywords in the cloud environment

entry.title: supplier invoice
entry.content:
On using loop condition as suggested by Google Gemini to prepare the code for BAdI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION for performing profit center substitution for intercompany supplier invoice journal entries as requested by our client, we are unable to get it to work as it reads such journal entries line by line. Due to the restrictions of this BAdI and the cloud environment, it is not working as expected. SAP has confirmed this restriction of the BAdI that when it operates in context of one item, the other items of posting can't be accessed.

We are getting a ODATA runtime error: 'TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED' while using the loop condition. We are also getting similar runtime errors while performing other functions like PGI for outbound delivery, MIGO post goods receipt etc.

 

Also conditions like class and method can't be used for coding due to non availability of these keywords in the cloud environment

entry.title: S/4 Hana Public Edition Line Item Mass Change
entry.content:
Hi all, 

does anybody knows how can I include the field House Bank Account in the Line Item Mass Change ? it is mandatory for our process .

We are using S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition.

thanks for any help

Lilian M Margonari

entry.title: We have one legal entity with multiple plants. Can we create separate groups of those plants?
entry.content:
We have one legal entity with many plants.

We want to create separate groups of multiple plants as one unit.

What are the alternatives in SAP to do this?

entry.title: Facing SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR' in HANA Cloud
entry.content:
An Error is seen when running a query with Fuzzy Search

Database Version 

2024.14.28 (QRC 2/2024)

Error

SQL Error [7] [HY000]: SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR': line 1599
  SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR': line 1599
  SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR': line 1599

Query Run

WITH "$P" AS
  (SELECT *,
          '$[' || lpad("$$RN$$", 6, '0') AS _path_
   FROM
     (SELECT "$P".DistanceFromRoot,
             "$P".DrillState,
             "$P".LimitedDescendantCount,
             "$P".SenderBusinessSystemId,
             "$P".code,
             "$P".displayId,
             "$P".node_id,
             "$P".productClassificationType,
             "$P".productClassificationVersion,
             "RANK" AS "$$RN$$"
      FROM
        (SELECT SenderBusinessSystemId,
                code,
                displayId,
                "$$NODE_ID$$" AS node_id,
                productClassificationType,
                productClassificationVersion,
                HIERARCHY_RANK - 1 AS "RANK",
                HIERARCHY_LEVEL - 1 AS DistanceFromRoot,
                CASE
                    WHEN HIERARCHY_TREE_SIZE = 1 THEN 'leaf'
                    WHEN HIERARCHY_DISTANCE = 0 THEN 'leaf'
                    ELSE 'expanded'
                END AS DrillState,
                HIERARCHY_TREE_SIZE - 1 AS LimitedDescendantCount
         FROM HIERARCHY_ANCESTORS
           (SOURCE HIERARCHY(SOURCE
                               (SELECT "$P".SenderBusinessSystemId, "$P".code, "$P".displayId, "$P".node_id AS "$$NODE_ID$$", "$P".productClassificationType, "$P".productClassificationVersion, node_id AS NODE_ID, parent_id AS PARENT_ID
                                FROM localized_Mdcs_odm_ProductClassification AS "$P")) AS "$P" START
            WHERE (CASE
                       WHEN SCORE(? IN ("$P".displayId) FUZZY MINIMAL TOKEN SCORE 0.7 SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE 'search') > 0 THEN TRUE
                       ELSE FALSE
                   END) = TRUE)) AS "$P"
      LIMIT 239
      OFFSET ?) AS "$P")
SELECT _path_ AS "_path_",
       '{}' AS "_blobs_",
       '{}' AS "_expands_",

  (SELECT TO_NVARCHAR(DistanceFromRoot) AS "DistanceFromRoot",
          DrillState AS "DrillState",
          TO_NVARCHAR(LimitedDescendantCount) AS "LimitedDescendantCount",
          SenderBusinessSystemId AS "SenderBusinessSystemId",
          code AS "code",
          displayId AS "displayId",
          node_id AS "node_id",
          productClassificationType AS "productClassificationType",
          productClassificationVersion AS "productClassificationVersion"
   FROM JSON_TABLE('{}', '$' COLUMNS("'$$FaKeDuMmYCoLuMn$$'"
                                     FOR
                                     ORDINALITY))
   FOR JSON ('format'='no',
             'omitnull'='no',
             'arraywrap'='no') RETURNS NVARCHAR(2147483647)) AS "_json_"
FROM "$P"
ORDER BY "_path_" ASC

Ask

  1. Is this not supported at all
  2. If this is fixed, which version should we upgrade to?

entry.title: Post tax payable - Vat return Poland - list of invoices included
entry.content:
Dear community,

I would like to ask you if there is a possibility to extract list of all invoices included (e.g. from last fiscal year) in the tax payable postings. Currently for vat return we use app run statutory reports but when you move to the step for report creation and you press new run you are redirected to the old GUI app - Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax and tax payable is posted via batch session:

The posting is done per profit center and there is no link to related invoices. So do you know if there is any cds or app which stored this kind of information (invoices included in each run/post payable posting).

Thanks,

Kamil

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Archiving Procedure for Handling Units and Batches in SAP S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content: In SAP S/4 Public Cloud I need to proceed with the archiving of handling units and batches. We would need information regarding the Apps to use and all the steps to implement to proceed with the archiving of the indicated objects. Following an initial check, we found that the App to use is Archive Administration but we do not detect it within our system. We tried with the Archive Explorer App but there are no active objects. If this is the App to use, how do you activate the objects?

entry.title: Mass deletion of handling units in SAP S/4 Public Coud
entry.content:
In S/4 Public Cloud we need to proceed with the operation of emptying and massively deleting the handling units. We are using the App Create and process unassigned handling units (HU02) but within it it is not possible to select a large number of HU. Since the HU to be emptied and deleted are 50,000, is there a way or an App that allows us to proceed more quickly with the operation? 

We also tried to copy and paste from csv files. but in the App it is possible to paste a few lines at a time

entry.title: Can we retrieve the Level 1 processor details for a Purchase Order Workflow in S4 HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are using the CDS View: I_WorkflowStatusOverview to retrieve the Purchase Order Workflow details but are not able to find the level 1 approver. We do get all the approver list but we need to display only Level 1 processor details. 

Let us know the CDS view/Field name for the same. 

Refer to the below screenshot: 

Thanks and Regards,

Shweta Sharma

entry.title: 从外围系统OA怎么更新ES销售订单行项目
entry.content:
场景：销售订单在OA审批不通过，审批结果传SAP，需修改销售订单抬头状态和订单行拒绝原因。
方法：调用两个接口分别修改销售订单抬头和订单行；销售订单如果有10行，需要调用销售订单行接口10次。这种方式十分不友好，有没有其它方法？

entry.title: EPIC集成银行CBS系统的落地方案
entry.content: SAP HANA 公有云版本2502中，是否能通过BTP平台 CPI组件 让SAP 的EPIC功能与中国的CBS银行系统集成， 如果可行，希望能获取具体的实施方案。

entry.title: Intermittent Issue Starting HANA DB Instance: Provision/Update Operation Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are facing an intermittent issue while attempting to start our HANA DB instance. The error message displayed is:

Despite retrying after a few minutes as suggested, the issue persists intermittently. Has anyone encountered this issue before? If so, what steps can be taken to resolve it?

entry.title: Missing Intermediary Agent Node (</IntrmyAgt1>) for few transactions in Bank Chain Setup
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have a requirement to use an intermediary bank for intercompany supplier transactions in both USD and EUR. To meet this requirement, we created two intermediary banks in the Manage Bank Chains app—one for USD and one for EUR—with identical details except for the currency.

These intermediary bank details have been assigned to the supplier master data. However, during testing, we observed that the intermediary agent node appears correctly for few transactions, but not for all USD and EUR transactions—the node itself is missing.

Could you please advise if there is any configuration step we might have missed in the setup? Test Case Screenshot are attached for reference.

 

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dears,

As it is in subject - How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud ?

For purpose:

Persons on B2B contract - they can't see each other's invoices in Supplier Invoice List app. 

Both person will be in the same Company Code, in the same Purchasing Group. Only difference will be in Cost Center.

How can we avoid this kind of situations ? 

Which attribute can limit this?

Regards

entry.title: SAP CAP Hana Cloud Table access over synonym not working
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We have a CAP service that needs to access a Hana Cloud DB over synonyms.

The DB table looks as follows:

Our cds data model:

namespace reverse.logix;

@cds.persistence.exists 
entity Addresses {
  key ShippingPoint : String(4);
  AddressID  : String(10);
}

Our synonym file:

{
  "REVERSE_LOGIX_ADDRESSES": {
    "target": {
        "schema": "SBX",        
        "object": "2VS_YY1_SHIPPT_ADDR"
    }
  }
}

Because the DB Table columns are in CamelCase, we have added the property cdsc in the package.json file (otherwise we were getting an error that the column was not recognized).

  "cds": {
    "cdsc": {  "sqlMapping": "quoted"  },
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa"
    },
    "sql": {
      "native_hana_associations": false
    }
  }

But we are getting the error as follows:

Error: "src/gen/ReverseLogixService.ShipmentAddresses.hdbview": the file requires "db://reverse.logix.Addresses" which is not provided by any file [8212001] (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#

 Any idea about how can be wrong?

Thanks!

C.

entry.title: Missing tab in SOAMANAGER
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We're currently activating our Inbound for EDI, and while we run the SOAMANAGER, we didn't see the "Application and Scenario Communcation Tab". 

Is there any updates or changes for this tab name in SOAMANAGER? or is there a guide to add this tab via authorization in SU01 to be visible this in SOAMANAGER?

BTW, currently we're using S4 HANA Private Cloud Edition 2020.

Thank you in advance!
-Jaspher
